# `ta.tema`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.2

Triple Exponential Moving Average —
`TEMA = 3·EMA(src) − 3·EMA(EMA(src)) + EMA(EMA(EMA(src)))`. Composes
three EMA sub-slots derived from the parent slot id
(`${slotId}/ema1`, `${slotId}/ema2`, `${slotId}/ema3`). Each outer
EMA reads the inner EMA's `.current` scalar each bar; the parent
slot allocates its own `outBuffer + series` because the output is a
linear combination of the three sub-slots. Mirrors the DEMA / MACD
sub-slot pattern.

## Formula

ema1 = EMA(source, length) ;
ema2 = EMA(ema1, length) ;
ema3 = EMA(ema2, length) ;
out  = 3 · ema1 − 3 · ema2 + ema3

## Warmup

3 · length − 3

## Signature

```ts
function tema(slotId: string, source: ScalarOrSeries, length: number, _opts?: TemaOpts): Series<number>;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `ta.<id>(...)` without it._

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `slotId` | `string` | — | — |
| `source` | `ScalarOrSeries` | — | — |
| `length` | `number` | — | — |
| `_opts` | `TemaOpts` | (optional) | — |

## Returns

`Series<number>`

## Example

```ts
// import { ta } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    // const t = ta.tema(bar.close, 20);
    // plot(t);
```
